title: Permission
description: ApprovalRequiredAIFunction gates dangerous tools behind human approval via ToolApprovalRequestContent.

steps.content: What's the weather in Tokyo? Also delete the file 'temp.txt'.
steps.annotation: The user asks for both a safe operation (weather) and a dangerous one (delete file).

steps.content: I'll check the weather and handle the file deletion.
steps.annotation: The agent processes the request, calling GetWeather directly (no approval needed).
Safe tools execute immediately — no approval gate.
The safe tool result returns without interruption.
ApprovalRequiredAIFunction intercepts DeleteFile and emits ToolApprovalRequestContent instead of executing.
The user approves. CreateResponse() builds the approval response fed back to the agent.
After approval, the agent receives the response and continues processing.

steps.content: The weather in Tokyo is 28°C and sunny. I've also deleted temp.txt for you.
steps.annotation: The agent summarizes both the safe tool result and the approved dangerous tool result.
